betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Iron Furnace§f

§aA 20% faster furnace that conserves fuel and supports speed upgrades.§f

The §bIron Furnace§f is a pseudo-multiblock upgrade to the vanilla furnace. It only consumes fuel during operation, has burn time bonuses (+25–100% depending on fuel), and accepts Mk.I–III speed upgrades.

§6Crafting§f:
Made from iron ingots, a furnace, and stone bricks.

§eTip§f: With a Mk.III speed upgrade it smelts at double speed — 4 seconds per operation.
